data.content: Good — I can see the project structure. Let me run the tests with coverage collection and analyze the results.
data.reasoningText: Now I have a good understanding of the project. Let me run the tests with code coverage enabled. The project uses MSTest with coverlet.collector. I'll run tests with coverage collection and then analyze the results.
